title: Long Xuyen、An Giang — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Long Xuyen、An Giang的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Long Xuyen是An Giang的一個城市，人口約280,000。A Mekong Delta city known for its floating markets and riverside life, offering one of the lowest costs of living in all of Vietnam.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
